NAME: Ivan Vasilyevich Shchukin
NOTE: Old-Believer Moscow textile magnate (I.V. Shchukin & Sons; ~4M gold roubles). m. Ekaterina Botkina. Father of the four collector-brothers.

NAME: Pyotr Ivanovich Shchukin
COLLECTED: Russian antiquities, textiles, jewelry, Eastern & applied art; some Impressionists
NOTE: Built the Shchukin Museum of Russian Antiquities (Malaya Gruzinskaya); donated to the Historical Museum 1905. Owned Pissarro 'Place du Théâtre Français' (1898), Renoir 'Nude Seated on a Sofa' (1876).

NAME: Sergei Ivanovich Shchukin
NOTE: 50 Picasso, 41 Matisse, 17 Gauguin, 16 Derain, 13 Monet, 8 Cézanne, 4 Van Gogh + long tail. Nationalised 5 Nov 1918 → First Museum of New Western Painting → GMNZI → 1948 Hermitage/Pushkin split.

NAME: Dmitri Ivanovich Shchukin
NOTE: 'Moscow's best Old Masters.' Bruegel, Avercamp, Heda, J. van Ruisdael. Donated 19 pictures 1903. Later head of Italian painting dept (1924). Porcelain → Kuskovo.

NAME: Ivan Ivanovich Shchukin
COLLECTED: Impressionist paintings; Spanish Old Masters (El Greco, Goya circle)
NOTE: Paris from 1893; writer/critic; salon at 91 av. de Wagram (Rodin, Degas, Renoir, Redon, Huysmans, Durand-Ruel). Introduced Pyotr & Sergei to French art. Suicide 1908. Owned Monet 'Lilac in the Sun' (1872).

NAME: Nikolai Vasilyevich Shchukin
LOCATION: Family / estate; exhibited NY, Paris, Moscow
NOTE: Founder of Gallery SHCHUKIN (1987); former psychoanalyst. Collection of Marina & Nikolai: Malevich, Kandinsky, Goncharova, Larionov, Popova, Suetin, Rozanova, Exter, Chagall. Lineage to historic Shchukins = family-asserted, not genealogically corroborated. Dates/patronymic/NACFUND-1997 = estate records.
SOURCES: galleryshchukin.com; PRNewswire 2014; Arte Fuse; Say Who; family/estate

NAME: Gallery SHCHUKIN
NOTE: Paris on Avenue Matignon (Oct 2013); NY Chelsea→Murray Hill. Collaborations: Tretyakov, Museum of the East. Artists incl. Datuna, Semenov, Garunov, Migachev, Zaloznaya, Tishin.

NAME: National Art Collections Foundation (NACFUND)
NOTE: Non-profit component of Gallery SHCHUKIN per the gallery's own statement; founding year 1997 from estate records.

NAME: Marina Shchukin
NOTE: Avant-garde collection associated jointly with 'Marina and Nikolay Shchukin' in the 2014 Drutt exhibition record.

NAME: Dmitry Shchukin
NOTE: 15+ yrs brand development of Gallery SHCHUKIN. Projects: 'Copies of Russian Museums' Masterpieces', 'Open Museum', album 'Art of Russia: Present, Future' (Art Moscow 2002), avant-garde shows Moscow 2003–04. Fairs via Leila Heller (Hamptons, Art Wynwood, Palm Beach).
